'''Jysella Terrik''' was the wife of [[Booster Terrik]] and mother to [[Mirax Terrik Horn|Mirax Terrik]]. She died when Mirax was just a child.<ref name="X-wingIsard'sRevenge">''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''</ref>

[[Jysella Horn]], one of Mirax's children, was named after her.

==Behind the scenes==
Although mentioned in several sources, the mother of Mirax and wife of Booster was not officially named until the release of the sourcebook [[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] in [[2008]].
